revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-090

Slew control (in Loran)

Left-right control (in Loran)

The equipment control by means of which the received pulse signals are placed at the proper operating point on the time base.

{{IALAFooter}}
